title: Maa Inti Devatha
desc: Murali Babu, a wealthy man, falls for Shobha Devi, a middle-class girl, and wishes to marry her. But his mother's disapproval threatens their love and upcoming marriage.

title: Bhairavi
desc: It's about a 7 year old girl and her mother inheriting a big property and facing threats from the uncle who pretends to protect but aims to snatch it away.

title: Srimati Annapurna Catering
desc: A warm family story exploring cooking, togetherness, and cultural bonding as heartfelt moments unfold through challenges and shared meals.

title: Ammaku Prematho
desc: Separated siblings Kavya and Shravya face twists as Rajiv seeks revenge and Kavya searches for her mother. What happens when Sharada is released?

title: Bhamalu Satyabhamalu
desc: A lively women's show with fun games, engaging activities, heartfelt chats, and inspiring stories-leaving the audience connected, entertained, and uplifted.

title: Kottaga Rekkalochenna
desc: Kaveri's life is a rollercoaster of problems, betrayals, and heartbreak until she meets Arjun's mother, who seeks her help to heal their rift.

title: Abhinandana
desc: Rani's love story takes an unexpected twist when she's forced into marriage with her brother-in-law. Years later, she reunites with her true love.

title: Sivangi
desc: Sivangi is an engaging Telugu drama following the struggles, triumphs, and emotional journey of a determined woman as she faces challenges in life and love.

title: Srimati Annapurna Catering
desc: A warm family story exploring cooking, togetherness, and cultural bonding as heartfelt moments unfold through challenges and shared meals.

title: Maa Inti Devatha
desc: Murali Babu, a wealthy man, falls for Shobha Devi, a middle-class girl, and wishes to marry her. But his mother's disapproval threatens their love and upcoming marriage.

title: Bhamalu Satyabhamalu
desc: A lively women's show with fun games, engaging activities, heartfelt chats, and inspiring stories-leaving the audience connected, entertained, and uplifted.

title: Sri Hari Kalyanam
desc: A heartfelt tale of resilience and family bonds unfolds in Srihari Kalyanam, a heartwarming saga about love, family, and enduring connections amidst life's challenges.

title: Naatu Vaidhyam
desc: This health show presents Dr. Sakthi Subramani's Ayurvedic home remedies using natural, medicinal ingredients to treat ailments and promote overall health and wellness.

title: Gemini Bhakti Geetalu
desc: Gemini Bhakti Geetalu features soulful Telugu devotional songs celebrating God, spirituality, and faith, offering viewers a serene and uplifting musical experience.

title: Nandini
desc: A fake wedding photo forces an unmarried couple to wed, but on their wedding night, the bride reveals she's a ghost intent on killing the groom.

title: Ranga Ranga Pandu Ranga
desc: Sakhu, a devoted follower of Lord Panduranga, faces poverty, betrayal, and suffering due to jealousy, yet her unwavering faith and selflessness showcase the true power of devotion and love.
